title: Egyptian-Style Red Onion Pie
description: A flavorful pie that combines the sweetness of red onions with the spices of Egypt. Perfect as a side dish or light meal.
instructions: 2. Roll out the radiant pie crust and place in a pie dish.
3. In a pan, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
4. Add the thinly sliced Egyptian and red onions and cook until softened.
5. Sprinkle the cumin, salt, and black pepper over the onions.
6. Fill the pie crust with the onion mixture.
7. Brush the edges of the pie crust with olive oil.
8. Roll out the remaining pie crust and use to cover the pie.
9. Crimp the edges to seal the pie.
10. Cut a few slits in the top crust to allow steam to escape.
11. Bake for 40-45 minutes, or until the crust is golden brown.
12. Serve warm, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
